{{Quote|It's only a light cruiser… not in the full Star-Destroyer class!|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="SW18:TES" />}}
The '''''Pursuit''-class light cruiser''' was a type of [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].<ref name="SW18:TES" />

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|Or that one of the Empire's ''Pursuit''-class cruisers would immediately hop on our tails, intent upon nailing us as the Rebel pirates?!|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 19">[[Star Wars (1977) 19|''Star Wars'' (1977) 19]]</ref>}}
[[File:Monitor_firing.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A ''Pursuit''-class light [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] lets loose a barrage of gun fire from the turrets and stationary gun.]]
The ''Pursuit''-class [[Light cruiser/Legends|light cruiser]] resembled a small variant of the more common [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] used, though the main hull was a rather flat, square-bowed platform instead of a deep-keeled dagger. The main engines were mounted in the superstructure rising above the hull platform at the rear, which was topped by a row of [[sensor globe]]s. The primary armament consisted of two weapons turrets mounted ahead of the superstructure.<ref name="SW18:TES" />

The light [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] had a docking bay capable of launching several [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], and it was sometimes equipped with more potent [[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|TIE Advanced x1]] starfighters. In open space, the cruiser's straight-line acceleration seems to have been slightly below that of [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']].<ref name="SW18:TES" />

The bridge's interior design featured a similar cockpit window design to that of Kuat-designed starships, and featured consoles directly near the windows.<ref name="TEGTW" />

==History==
In the [[Battle of Andalia]], the ''Pursuit''-class light cruiser ''[[Shepherd]]'', commanded by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Osvald Teshik]], led a contingent of two squadrons of TIE fighters and eight gunships to fight the Hapan consortium that was doomed to fail, resulting in the destruction of the ship and the entire fleet.<ref name="TEGTW" /> Another ''Pursuit''-class vessel named [[Enforcement (Pursuit-class)|''Enforcement'']] was used as a [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]] by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Zertik Strom/Legends|Strom]] in his [[Sector/Legends|sector]] near [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]].<ref name="SW18:TES" />
